text:
おう、お疲れ様。
充実した良い探索だったな。

終わった後の充実感、探索中の緊迫感
中々味わえない感覚だ。

いずれまた別の場所も探索したい。
機会があったら、よろしく頼む

Hey there. Good work. That was a satisfying
mission, wasn't it?

I don't get these sensations too often--
The fulfillment after the mission's done, nor the
excitement during.

There are still other locales I want to
explore, if we get the chance to tackle them
together.
